nodes.label: Arena Field Battle Background
nodes.description: 2D casual game battle background scene featuring a pastel-colored outdoor arena field. Sandy foreground terrain with rolling soft green hills in the midground, a light teal gradient sky with faint horizontal cloud streaks, and two circular green grass patches with small plant sprouts placed in the foreground and midground. Visual style is flat gradient illustration typical of casual mobile or browser-based games. Used as a battle arena stage background.
